ofm.title: Fanvue raised $22M Series A
ofm.summary: and hit a $100M run rate. Platform now supports AI creators with subscriptions, PPV content, tips, and custom requests. 20,000 new creators joined last month.

ofm.title: OnlyMonster is dominating
ofm.summary: the OFM management space with advanced AI assistance integrated into workflows — outpacing competitors during beta without even running promos.

ofm.title: AI girlfriend market exploding
ofm.summary: USD $1.5B revenue in 2026, projected 17% CAGR. Top platforms see $120 ARPU with 93% monthly retention.

ofm.title: OnlyFans AI detection tightening
ofm.summary: New 2026 policies on AI/deepfake detection using Hive's tools. Agencies need transparency and proper disclosure when using AI.

ofm.title: Successful Fanvue AI creators
ofm.summary: earning $500-5,000/month after 3-6 months of consistent posting. Social media funnel (IG/TikTok/X/Reddit) is required before monetization works.

tools.title: OpenClaw went viral
tools.summary: in Jan 2026 — now 100+ built-in AgentSkills, model-agnostic, privacy-focused. NYT covered China's government wariness about it.

tools.title: NVIDIA NemoClaw released
tools.summary: (March 16) — adds security/privacy for always-on AI assistants. Runs on RTX PCs, DGX Station, cloud and on-prem.

tools.title: Claude Code Hooks
tools.summary: now available for workflow automation — can block/allow tool use programmatically. Exit codes: 0=allow, 2=block (PreToolUse).

tools.title: Claude Code workflows
tools.summary: repo available with end-to-end AI-assisted development plugins via `/plugin marketplace add`.

market.title: Puerto Escondido rental market strong
market.summary: — growing international/domestic demand, improved infrastructure, year-round occupancy diversifying. Houston direct flight (2025) already driving buyer interest.

market.title: Additional flight routes coming 2026
market.summary: — Canadian and more U.S. connections planned for Puerto Escondido airport. Precedent: Cabo/Puerto Vallarta saw dramatic property value surges after direct international routes established.

market.title: Earth USA 2026 conference
market.summary: — September 18-20 in Santa Fe, NM. Rammed earth, adobe, compressed earth block focus. Beno's Sirewall training connects here.

market.title: Robotic ramming emerging
market.summary: as scalable method — digitally controlled compaction, Rhino/Grasshopper workflow for toolpaths. Prefab rammed earth blocks gaining traction for quality control and speed.
